description: Search the user's Gmail inbox with a Gmail query string (e.g. 'is:unread', 'from:jane@example.com subject:invoice', 'newer_than:7d'). Returns message metadata: id, thread, from, to, subject, date, snippet, labels. Use gmail_read with a message id to read a full message.

query.description: Gmail search query (same syntax as the Gmail search box)
